## Feature Summary

<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like -->

## Problem Statement

<!-- Describe the problem this feature would solve -->

**Is your feature request related to a problem?**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

<!-- Describe the solution you'd like -->

### Detailed Description

<!-- Provide a detailed description of how you envision this feature working -->

### User Stories

<!-- If applicable, describe the feature from a user's perspective -->

As a [type of user], I want [some goal] so that [some reason].

## Alternative Solutions

<!-- Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered -->

## Technical Considerations

### API Changes

<!-- Would this require new API endpoints or changes to existing ones? -->

- [ ] New API endpoint(s) needed
- [ ] Existing API changes needed
- [ ] No API changes needed

### Database Changes

<!-- Would this require database schema changes? -->

- [ ] New tables needed
- [ ] Schema modifications needed
- [ ] No database changes needed

### Dependencies

<!-- Would this require new dependencies? -->

- [ ] New Python packages
- [ ] New npm packages
- [ ] No new dependencies

## Mockups / Wireframes

<!-- If applicable, add mockups or wireframes to help explain your feature -->

## Priority

<!-- How important is this feature? -->

- [ ] Critical - Blocking production use
- [ ] High - Needed for upcoming release
- [ ] Medium - Would significantly improve the product
- [ ] Low - Nice to have

## Additional Context

<!-- Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request here -->
